DispatchCondition.Title: Both Center Tank Pumps Operate Normally

ListItem.Para: Valve is locked closed.
Fuel balance switch operates normally.
Main tank inboard refuel valves operate normally.
Both center tank pumps operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Lock the crossfeed valve closed (AMM DDG 28-22-03).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
ENG XFEED VLV CLOSE
ENG XFEED VLV OPEN
Open and deactivate the landing gear doors.
Gain access to the crossfeed valve in the main gear wheel well.
Disconnect, cap and stow the valve electrical connector.
Lock the valve closed.
Close the landing gear doors.

OperationNote.Para: FUEL CROSSFEED advisory message will be displayed and the fuel synoptic will incorrectly display a green flow line for the crossfeed valve deactivated in the closed position. The EICAS display will have expanded fuel indications.

ListItem.Para: Valve is locked closed.
Fuel balance switch operates normally.
Main tank inboard refuel valves operate normally.
Both center tank pumps are inoperative.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Lock the crossfeed valve closed (AMM DDG 28-22-03).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
ENG XFEED VLV CLOSE
ENG XFEED VLV OPEN
Open and deactivate the landing gear doors.
Gain access to the crossfeed valve in the main gear wheel well.
Disconnect, cap and stow the valve electrical connector.
Lock the valve closed.
Close the landing gear doors.

OperationNote.Para: FUEL CROSSFEED advisory message will be displayed and the fuel synoptic will incorrectly display a green flow line for the crossfeed valve deactivated in the closed position. The EICAS display will have expanded fuel indications.
